query:
INSERT INTO webs (name, description, color, icon) VALUES
('Natural', 'The organic web of biological systems, ecosystems, and natural forces that underpin civilisation', '#22c55e', '🌿'),
('Machine', 'The mechanical web of engines, structures, and physical infrastructure that builds civilisation', '#f59e0b', '⚙️'),
('Digital', 'The information web of communications, computing, and signal networks that connect civilisation', '#3b82f6', '💻'),
('Biological', 'The human web of medicine, genetics, and biological engineering that sustains civilisation', '#ec4899', '🧬'),
('Consciousness', 'The meta-web of awareness, philosophy, and collective intelligence that transcends civilisation', '#a855f7', '🧠');
